expected_effect: Preserve the event-threshold incumbent's burst defense while modestly improving truly quiet normal conditions.
rationale: The new incumbent wins by charging much more in stressed observation regimes. A prior worker also found a small positive quiet-regime carry rebate. Test whether a very narrow extra quiet rebate can recover some normal-condition retail flow on top of the winning event-threshold line without reopening arb loss.
title: Event threshold plus quiet rebate
